modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open Google Drive with department email account

full_description_text: 
So, I was trying to use the department email to get into Google Drive. But it just wouldn’t let me in. I thought it should work, but it didn’t. Can you help me with this?
short_description: Unable to open Google Drive with department email account
description: So, I was trying to use the department email to get into Google Drive. But it just wouldn’t let me in. I thought it should work, but it didn’t. Can you help me with this?
